In the kingdoms of this world, readiness for war creates security for peace; similarly, nothing encourages Satan's attacks as much as being unwary. As long as we stand armed with the whole armor of God, in the practice of faith, and preparation of heart for the conflict, we will certainly be safe, and likely enjoy inward peace.

The officers of the court, or the rulers of the king’s substance, had oversight and charge of the king's tillage, his vineyards, his herds, his flocks, which formed the wealth of eastern kings. Much of the wisdom of princes is seen in the choice of their ministry, and common people show it in the choice of their advisors. David, though he had all these about him, preferred the word of God before them all. Your testimonies are my delight and my counselors.
